log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:3+3=6 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Yuan-Ti — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:12+7=19 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.

REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/5 targets affected.
